comment: Synthetic Stage IV cutaneous melanoma, 72F, ECOG 1, BRAF/NRAS/KIT wild-type by NGS. Patient has well-controlled autoimmune Hashimoto thyroiditis on stable levothyroxine + age 72 — relative contraindication to ipi+nivo Grade 3-4 irAE risk (~50%). Anchor target: KEYNOTE-006 pembrolizumab monotherapy. KB DRIFT NOTE: ALGO-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L has only two output indications (IND-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L-NIVO-IPI default + IND-MELANOMA-BRAF-METASTATIC-1L-DABRA-TRAME aggressive). There is NO 1L pembrolizumab-monotherapy indication in the metastatic-1L algorithm at this baseline (gap explicitly listed in algo_melanoma_metastatic_2l notes wiring-gap #2). Engine routes ALGO-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L step 0 (KIT absent) → step 1 (BRAF-V600-ACTIONABLE absent — branch result IND-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L-NIVO-IPI). Per intent the case still surfaces nivo+ipi as the standard-track default; an MDT note is appropriate to flag pembro-mono as an off-algorithm de-escalation for the irAE-frail subset (NCCN cat 1 KEYNOTE-006). Aggressive-track BRAFi+MEKi correctly suppressed since BRAF-WT.
